_note: language-neutral register templates for the built-in panels; merge user kwargs over `data`, json-encode into props.data. Each template's `contract` declares what an SDK sets/sends and what the panel emits — see PROTOCOL.md § component contracts

contract.binary: receives AUDIO (code 2): int16-LE PCM streamed by the owner

props.themed: bool -- follow the canvas theme variables

updates.post: opaque value delivered to the document's canvas.onPush
